creator: mikhail.maximov@gmail.com
text:
There is a way to go around the issue - install Python package `contextvars` manually:
# pkg install py39-pip
# pip install contextvars

There are a lot of warnings though. "Do not use pip as root", "use venv", etc. I have Salt in a jail so this is less relevant for my case.

According to python package description [https://pypi.org/project/contextvars/], even if contextvars is installed in higher versions of Python, the internal implementation will be used.
